slides.title: Strict Labels 🏷️
slides.content:
Sometimes we want to be explicit instead of using `var`.

Dart has strong types:
* `int` for whole numbers.
* `double` for decimal numbers.
* `String` for text.
* `bool` for true/false.

slides.title: Using Types

quizData.question: Which data type would you use to store the word 'Hello'?
quizData.explanation: Text is always stored in a `String`!

slides.title: Brain Teaser
slides.content: If you store `3.14`, which type should you use? Think about decimals.
